revision.comment: add category using [[Project:AWB|AWB]]
revision.text:
{{estcatCountry|194|0|Japan}}
[[Category:1940 establishments in Asia|Japan]]

revision.comment: Bot:add Commons category
[[Template:EstcatCountry]] now needs no year parameters, replaced: {{estcatCountry|194|0|Japan}} → {{EstcatCountry|Japan}}}}
link to Commons is now defined on wikidata
7 revisions imported
Copying from [[Category:Commons category link from Wikidata]] to [[Category:pages from wikipedia]][[en:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:pages from wikipedia]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Moving from [[Category:Pages from wikipedia]] to [[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia40]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Copying from [[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia40]] to [[Category:dd]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
{{Commons category}} {{EstcatCountry|Japan}}
[[Category:1940 establishments in Asia|Japan]] [[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia40]] [[Category:dd]] [[en:1940 establishments in Japan]][[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia40]] [[Category:dd]]

revision.comment: Moving from [[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia44]] to [[Category:Categories from wikipedia]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
{{Commons category}} {{EstcatCountry|Japan}}
[[Category:1940 establishments in Asia|Japan]] [[Category:Categories from wikipedia]] [[Category:dd]] [[en:1940 establishments in Japan]][[Category:Categories from wikipedia]] [[Category:dd]]

revision.comment: removing these two bullshit categories
Copying from [[Category:List of Shikinaisha]] to [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Text replacement - "qq" to "11"
Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates. [[{page.name}]]
Bot: tidy & size tag (3 members)
Bot: tidy & size tag (2 members)
Imported from wikipedia at 2025-05-10 14:51:37
Bot: tag as Tier 0 category
Bot: confirm enwiki category & retag
Text replacement - "↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "[[Category:confirmed enwiki categories]]" to "[[en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[category:confirmed enwiki categories]]"
Bot: remove obsolete category Confirmed enwiki categories
Bot: tidy cats/IWs; add JA prose & tracking
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Tier 1 Categories
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "==Old Content==↵==" to "=="
Text replacement - "==Old Content==↵==" to "=="
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
revision.text:
==Old Content== {{Commons category}} {{EstcatCountry|Japan}}
==Categories==
[[en:Category:1940 establishments in Japan]] [[Category:categories missing wikidata]]
[[Category:1940 establishments in Asia|Japan]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:Original categories]]

revision.comment: Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q8138622)
Bot: remove [[Category:categories missing wikidata]] (has wikidata link)
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)
adding dummy category to make categories work
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "[[Category:pages]]" to "[[Category:Categories]]"
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Original categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
revision.text:
<!--templates-->
{{Commons category}}
{{EstcatCountry|Japan}}
{{wikidata link|Q8138622}}
<!--interwikis-->
[[en:Category:1940 establishments in Japan]]
<!--categories-->
[[Category:1940 establishments in Asia|Japan]]
[[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]]
